title: White Xp
description: This resource pack makes the xp bar, orbs and xp level text white.
body:
![white-xp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1WDq9nBG/images/193282a984e86c3862eb2ea8f07348e745810977.webp)

This resource pack makes the xp bar, orbs and xp level text white.

It requires either [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home) or [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic).
